name: specify-system
when_to_use: When you need to define the system requirements and implementation approach for a work item.
When the TUI should guide the user through a synchronous requirements-and-approach flow.

steps.description: Ask for the work item name and the minimum context needed to draft the requirements and approach.
Run `powdrr-lift system-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name>` to generate the template.
Fill out the requirements and approach sections with concise, testable statements.
Validate the filled template with `powdrr-lift evaluate-system-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name>` and fix issues until it passes.
